final:
module fixed_priority_arbiter (
    input [4:0] deny,
    output reg [4:0] grant
);
    always @(*) begin
        grant = 5'b00000; // Default no grant
        if (deny[0]) grant = 5'b00001; // Grant for deny[0]
        else if (deny[1]) grant = 5'b00010; // Grant for deny[1]
        else if (deny[2]) grant = 5'b00100; // Grant for deny[2]
        else if (deny[3]) grant = 5'b01000; // Grant for deny[3]
        else if (deny[4]) grant = 5'b10000; // Grant for deny[4]
    end
endmodule
